steps.description: Add basic approval counting and minimum threshold
steps.requiredChange: Implement minimum approval count requirement before allowing deploy
steps.evidenceRequired: Deployments rejected without minimum number of approvals

steps.requiredChange: Validate that each approver is authorized member of the team they're approving for
steps.evidenceRequired: Unauthorized approval attempts rejected, only team members can approve

steps.requiredChange: Each required team must meet its own approval threshold (not just total count)
steps.evidenceRequired: Deployments rejected if any team doesn't meet its quorum requirement

steps.description: Add approval expiration and revocation handling
steps.requiredChange: Implement approval expiration time window and proper revocation with notification
steps.evidenceRequired: Expired approvals rejected, revocations processed correctly, approvers notified

haltCondition: All admissibility rules satisfied: approver authority validated, team-specific quorum enforced, approval expiration handled, revocation properly processed, fail-closed on suspicious patterns
